The hiring process

This is a conversation, a chance for both of us to explore if this feels like the right match. You’ll have plenty of space to ask questions, share your story, and get a real sense of the people and culture behind monday.com.

What to expect

Share your CV

Send us your resume and highlight what makes you, you. We’ll take a look and see if there’s a match.

Chat with the recruiter

We’ll hop on a call to get to know each other, walk you through the role and team, and answer your questions.

Show your skills

You’ll take on a short task or interview. It's a chance for both of us to see how we work best.

Meet your future people

You’ll connect with your potential manager or team to see how your strengths and ideas align.

Chat with our HR team

We’ll talk about your journey and goals and explore how we can grow together.

Share your references

We’ll chat with people you’ve worked with to learn more about your impact and how you thrive.

Time to join the team

If everything clicks, we’ll send over your offer and get ready to kick things off together.

Chat with our HR team

Share your references

Time to join the team

If everything clicks, we’ll send over your offer and get ready to kick things off together.
* The process can vary between positions and sites

Our values aren't just what we believe, they're how we get things done.

Our values

Transparency and trust

Data is at the core of who we are. Open access helps teams work better together, build trust, and move quickly to make a real impact.

Impact and ownership

We believe in taking full ownership from start to finish. When people feel personally invested in their work, great things happen.

Speed and execution

The faster we act, the faster we learn. We listen, iterate, and keep improving with feedback from our teammates and customers.

Our values

Transparency and trust

Impact and ownership

Speed and execution

Product-first


Our products should work for the customer and not the other way around. Every product and feature is built to be intuitive, powerful, and easy to use.

Inclusivity

We prioritize diversity and inclusion not only because it is right, but because it makes our teams stronger and our products better.

Customer centricity

Our customers’ satisfaction and success is at the heart of everything we do. We believe that when our customers win, we win.

Product-first


Inclusivity

Customer centricity

We believe
in equal opportunity

At monday.com, we believe everyone should feel they belong - exactly as they are. We’re an equal opportunity employer, committed to an open, accessible, and inclusive workplace free from discrimination or harassment of any kind.

All qualified candidates will be considered for employment, regardless of race, color, religion, nationality, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, marital status, pregnancy, family or parental status, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

If you need support or accommodation during the hiring process, we’re here to help. Reach out to [email protected]

Frequently asked
questions

Questions?
  • Can I apply for more than one position?
    Absolutely. If you’re excited about a few roles, go for it! You can apply for more than one position (we suggest no more than three in 12 months). Each role has its own interview process, but applying to multiple won’t hurt your chances.
  • How long does the interview process take?
    Our process usually takes about four to five weeks from your first interview to an offer. It depends on the role, but we’ll always do our best to keep things moving and adjust the pace if you need us to move faster or slower.
  • Does monday.com offer hybrid work?
    Yes, we offer a hybrid work model. Most teams spend three days a week together in the office to collaborate and connect, with the flexibility to work wherever you do your best work the rest of the time. It’s all about finding your rhythm and making it work for you.
  • What is the onboarding experience like?
    We do our best work when we feel confident and connected. From day one, you’ll:
    - Pair up with a buddy who’ll help you navigate life at monday.com
    - Connect with your manager to get settled into your team and role
    - Learn about our culture, values, and ways of working so you have everything you need to succeed
  • How does monday.com support work-life balance?
    We believe balance comes from ownership and trust. You have the flexibility to manage your workload in a way that works for you, and we encourage open, honest conversations about priorities. Everyone’s balance looks a little different, and when personal commitments come up, we’ll always do our best to support you.
  • How does career growth work at monday.com?
    Growth looks different for everyone, and we’re here to support each path. Whether that means deepening your expertise, building new skills, or exploring a different path altogether - you’ll have access to learning programs, mentorship, and development opportunities to help you get there. Our internal mobility process also makes it easy to explore new roles at monday.com.
